steps.t: Reinn tried to get to the Twenty-first Hall from the Great Hall of Durin. You should backtrack from the Twenty-first Hall and search for Reinn, headin…
Ozût mentioned another Orc involved in Reinn's death. You should search the passages to the Great Hall of Durin for clues to Khîl's whereabouts.
It is likely that Khîl made his way to the high platform overlooking the centre of the Great Hall of Durin. You should search the high platform for an…
Mögr has followed you to this spot, and stands nearby in silence. You should speak with Mögr.
